baseline.note: ledger totals that predate canonical lifecycle accounting (accounted explicitly)

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

execution_gate_zero_reject_diagnostic.message: execution gate rejected 0 of 260 candidates that reached it — verify this is liquidity reality, not a disabled gate
likely_explanations: Polymarket BTC 5m books are tight + deep, so spread/depth/partial-fill checks pass
VWAP slippage over the top of book is tiny at $5.0 size, so EV-after-cost stays positive
the directional stage already rejected 16677 candidates before the gate, so only execution-feasible candidates reached it

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only — they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades — never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade — learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: With n=50 settled trades, DOWN_WEAK (wr 0.6923), 120-240s TTC (0.6667), range_middle (0.6875), range_bottom (0.7273), mixed MTF (0.6538) and dead volume (0.6471) show win-rates comfortably above breakeven with positive realized pnl and n>=8; trending regime and z-score -1..1 also look stable. Most other buckets remain marginal or negative-EV in practice despite positive avg_ev_after_cost. Overall book is still slightly negative due to small sample and a few toxic sub-buckets.
warnings: total n=50 still tiny; many buckets near n=8-11 boundary
realized pnl negative despite positive avg_ev_after_cost across board
focus_next: accumulate samples specifically in DOWN_WEAK + 120-240s + range_middle intersection
track whether dead-volume and mixed-MTF edges persist above n=30
monitor UP direction for any improvement

history.summary: With 49 settled trades, DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_WEAK), ttc 120-240s, volume=dead, range_middle/bottom, mtf=mixed, and supertrend=bullish show win-rates 0.63-0.80 with positive realized pnl and EV>0.10 after costs (n>=10-30); UP signals, volume=spike, range_top, and ttc<60s are clearly failing. Most other buckets remain noisy or marginal given small n and overall negative realized pnl despite positive EV. No material changes possible without prior_analysis.

With only 49 settled trades, DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_WEAK n=13 WR 0.69 and ttc 120-240s n=30 WR 0.67) show win-rates above plausible breakeven and positive realized pnl in small samples, while UP signals and short ttc remain negative EV in practice despite positive avg_ev_after_cost. Volume=dead, range_middle/bottom and supertrend_bullish buckets also clear n>=8 thresholds with constructive stats; all other slices are too small or mixed to confirm. Overall book remains slightly negative, indicating edge is still fragile.

With only 49 settled trades, no buckets meet strict criteria for confirmed profitability (win-rate confidently > breakeven + positive realized EV after costs + n>=8); DOWN_WEAK, DOWN direction, 120-240s TTC, mixed MTF, and dead volume show elevated win-rates but still negative aggregate PnL. Most patterns remain noise or overfit given variance, negative realized PnL across nearly all slices, and tiny per-bucket samples. This is the first analysis so no evolution yet observed.
changes_since_last: First analysis; no prior baseline available

history.summary: DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_WEAK n=13 wr=0.692) and mixed_mtf/range_middle/range_bottom/dead_volume/120-240s_ttc buckets show confirmed positive EV (0.12-0.14) with wr above breakeven and n>=8; trending/-1..1_zscore/bullish_supertrend also stable. UP_STRONG, <60s_ttc, volume_spike and range_top remain negative EV and overfit noise. Overall 49 trades still too small for live but selectivity improving on DOWN.

With 49 settled trades, DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_WEAK), 120-240s TTC, dead volume, range_middle/bottom, mixed MTF, and bullish supertrend show win-rates 0.60-0.80 above breakeven with positive EV_after_cost and n>=8-30, confirming edge; UP_STRONG, <60s TTC, volume spike, and range_top remain negative EV or low WR. Overall PnL still negative due to costs and weak buckets, but selectivity by signal level and regime is improving calibration. No material change possible without prior_analysis.
changes_since_last: No prior_analysis supplied; first calibration pass

history.summary: With only 49 settled trades, patterns with n>=8 show mixed results: confirmed positive EV and above-breakeven WR appear in ttc 120-240s (n=30, WR 0.667, +3.84 pnl), mixed mtf alignment (n=25, WR 0.68, +5.02 pnl), range_middle (n=16, WR 0.6875, +5.52 pnl), range_bottom (n=10, WR 0.8, +7.32 pnl), dead volume (n=16, WR 0.6875), and DOWN_WEAK signals (n=13, WR 0.6923), while overall pnl remains negative due to poor buckets. Many other dimensions (zscore, adx, supertrend, vwap) show WR near 0.5-0.6 but negative realized pnl and are likely noise given small samples and high variance. No prior analysis exists so all observations are baseline.
changes_since_last: First analysis; no prior baseline available

history.summary: With n=50 settled signals, DOWN direction (n=28, wr=0.607), DOWN_WEAK (n=13, wr=0.692), 120-240s TTC (n=30, wr=0.667), mixed MTF (n=26, wr=0.654), range_middle/bottom, dead/active volume, and bullish supertrend show win-rates above plausible breakeven with positive avg_ev_after_cost; UP signals and short-TTC buckets remain weak. Overall pnl negative but EV metrics stable across v3/v4 and trending regimes. Sample still too small for high-confidence confirmation beyond a few buckets.
changes_since_last: First analysis; sample reached 50 settled trades with DOWN bias emerging

history.summary: With n=50 settled trades, DOWN_WEAK (wr 0.6923), 120-240s TTC (0.6667), range_middle (0.6875), range_bottom (0.7273), mixed MTF (0.6538) and dead volume (0.6471) show win-rates comfortably above breakeven with positive realized pnl and n>=8; trending regime and z-score -1..1 also look stable. Most other buckets remain marginal or negative-EV in practice despite positive avg_ev_after_cost. Overall book is still slightly negative due to small sample and a few toxic sub-buckets.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only — never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective — never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.
